Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RAJIV PARMAR's Motion to Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two.

Defendant counsel contests the tentative ruling. Matter argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified.

The motion to compel further responses to plaintiff's request for production of documents (set two) is GRANTED. Defendant shall produce all non-privileged requested documents by February 06,2025.

Order signed/filed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Court Reporter: Ryan Wheeler, CSR #13717, (Tel:760-805-3974/ email: RyanWheeler91@yahoo.com
